title: desmodium barbatum subsp. saulierei
intro: Desmodium barbatum subsp. saulierei is a plant species commonly known as the 'sickle bush' or 'sicklepod'. It is a type of legume native to tropical Africa, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Desmodium barbatum subsp. saulierei is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves for topical application.
